use_cases: SaaS landing page hero sections showcasing product value
Developer tools marketing pages with clean, professional aesthetics
Product launch pages with prominent call-to-action buttons
Startup landing pages requiring modern, minimal hero design
Portfolio or personal brand landing pages
ai_summary: A Vercel-styled landing page hero component featuring clean typography, a prominent headline with supporting description, and a primary call-to-action button. Uses minimalist flat design with subtle hover interactions on interactive elements. Built with Radix UI primitives and class-variance-authority for consistent button variant theming. Ideal for SaaS products, developer tools, and technology landing pages seeking a professional, modern hero section.
